title: XRP Price Prediction: What 5 Wall Street Analysts Predict for XRP by 2030
description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has cleared every hurdle its community spent years waiting for—and the XRP price has done nothing but fall. The SEC case ended, spot ETFs launched, and the token just got classified as a digital commodity alongside Bitcoin. Yet XRP sits at roughly $1.40, down over 40% since January.
